title: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 64 Faculty and Senior Residents Posts
short_info: ESIC Medical College Hospital Hyderabad (ESIC) Faculty and Senior Residents Notification 2026 has been released on 06 May 2026 on the official website of ESIC. A total of 64 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Faculty and Senior Residents Recruitment 2026.Candidates up to 69 years for Faculty posts and up to 45 years for Senior Resident posts who have qualifications as per Medical Institutions (Qualifications of Faculty) Regulations 2025 (NMC Gazette Notification dated 30-06-2025) are eligible to apply for these Faculty and Senior Residents vacancies. age_limit.age_details: Faculty: Max 69 years, Senior Resident: Max 45 years
age_limit.details: Faculty: Maximum 69 years Senior Resident: Maximum 45 years

qualification.education_qualification: As per Medical Institutions (Qualifications of Faculty) Regulations 2025 (NMC Gazette Notification dated 30-06-2025)
qualification.details: Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor, Senior Resident, Senior Resident (1 Year): As per Medical Institutions (Qualifications of Faculty) Regulations 2025 (NMC Gazette Notification dated 30-06-2025)

salary_details.senior resident: 7 th CPC salary at Level-11 (In addition to the basic pay Rs. 67,700.00 + other allowances like DA, NPA & HRA etc would be paid according to rules in force

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies released by ESIC?
faq.answer: ESIC has released a total of 64 vacancies for Faculty and Senior Residents posts. These positions are available on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for these ESIC vacancies?
faq.answer: The application mode for these ESIC vacancies is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the ESIC Faculty and Senior Residents posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 67,700/- to Rs. 2,59,515/- per month, depending on the post and experience.

faq.question: Q4. What are the age limits for the ESIC Faculty and Senior Residents posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Faculty positions is 69 years, and for Senior Residents, it is 45 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for these ESIC posts?
faq.answer: The qualification required is as per the Medical Institutions (Qualifications of Faculty) Regulations 2025, as per the NMC Gazette Notification dated 30-06-2025.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates. However, General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 500/-.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled for ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interviews are scheduled on multiple dates in May 2026, starting from May 20, 2026, to May 28, 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the ESIC Medical College Hospital located?
faq.answer: The ESIC Medical College Hospital is located in Hyderabad, Telangana.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the ESIC Faculty and Senior Residents posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on an Interview.
